regime_fall.current_status: Iran faces escalating multi-front pressure from US naval blockade (initiated April 13, 2026), collapsed nuclear diplomacy, severe internal crackdowns with record executions and 41-day internet blackouts, and coordinated international isolation including Israeli regime change objectives and French de-escalation calls. Economic deterioration accelerates amid petrochemical layoffs, medicine shortages, and $35 million daily losses from internet shutdowns, while the Strait of Hormuz closure drives Brent crude toward $100/barrel.
regime_fall.last_major_event: President Trump announced on April 14, 2026 that the US military has initiated a comprehensive blockade of all Iranian ports, with claims that Iranian naval, air, and air defense capabilities have been neutralized, following collapsed nuclear talks and a six-week Strait of Hormuz closure.
